fields.definition_from_readme: Date that this project was last researched
fields.notes_from_readme: Units: yyyy-mm-dd.

fields.definition_from_readme: Primary country/area where the project is located (unabbreviated)
fields.notes_from_readme: If project is binational, Country/Area 1 is either the country/area listed first in alphabetical order for projects where capacity is shared equally, or the country/area with a larger portion of the total project capacity.

fields.definition_from_readme: Additional country/area where the project is located (unabbreviated)
fields.notes_from_readme: If project is binational, Country/Area 2 is either the country/area listed second in alphabetical order for projects where capacity is shared equally, or the country/area with a smaller portion of the total project capacity.

fields.definition_from_readme: Commonly used name
fields.notes_from_readme: Preference is for a government provided name. Without that information, the name used by the owner or operating company is listed.

fields.definition_from_readme: Commonly used name in the locally used script

top_values: Seti Khola, Seti River hydroelectric plant, Seti Nadi

fields.definition_from_readme: Total nameplate capacity, or best available data, of the project, in megawatts
fields.notes_from_readme: Units: MW.

fields.definition_from_readme: Indicates whether the project is located on an international boundary
fields.notes_from_readme: Units: Yes / No.

fields.definition_from_readme: Gross capacity, or best available data, of the portion of the project which is located in Country/Area 1, in megawatts, rounded to whole number
fields.notes_from_readme: Units: MW. Capacity cutoffs mentioned above apply to the project as a whole, not necessarily to the portions of an international project which are within the boundaries of one country/area.

fields.definition_from_readme: Gross capacity, or best available data, of the portion of the project which is located in Country/Area 2, in megawatts, rounded to whole number
fields.notes_from_readme: Units: MW. Capacity cutoffs mentioned above apply to the project as a whole, not necessarily to the portions of an international project which are within the boundaries of one country/area.

fields.definition_from_readme: Turbine number and capacity
fields.notes_from_readme: Information about the project's turbines, semicolon-separated.

fields.definition_from_readme: see rows 22-31 above

value_definitions.name: announced
value_definitions.definition: Described in corporate or government plans but have not yet taken concrete steps such as applying for permits.

value_definitions.name: pre-construction
value_definitions.definition: Actively moving forward in seeking governmental approvals, land rights, or financing.

value_definitions.name: construction
value_definitions.definition: Site preparation and equipment installation are underway.

value_definitions.name: operating
value_definitions.definition: Formally commissioned; commercial operation has begun.

value_definitions.name: shelved
value_definitions.definition: Suspension of progress has been announced.

value_definitions.name: shelved - inferred 2 y
value_definitions.definition: Inferred to be shelved if no progress has been observed for at least two years.

value_definitions.name: cancelled
value_definitions.definition: A cancellation announcement has been made.

value_definitions.name: cancelled - inferred 4 y
value_definitions.definition: Inferred to be cancelled if no progress has been observed for at least four years.

fields.definition_from_readme: Name of the complex that this project is a part of, if any
fields.notes_from_readme: Used to link together multiple projects that are part of a collection of related power-generating infrastructure but which should be considered different plants due to distinct physical infrastructure, geographic separation, and/or other factors such as ownership or operation. Left blank if not part of a complex.

fields.definition_from_readme: Year the project was or will be commissioned
fields.notes_from_readme: Units: yyyy.

fields.definition_from_readme: Year the project was or will be taken offline
fields.notes_from_readme: Units: yyyy.

value_definitions.name: conventional storage
value_definitions.definition: The project typically or entirely generates electricity from water stored in a reservoir.

value_definitions.name: pumped storage
value_definitions.definition: The project generates electricity using water which is cycled between a lower and an upper reservoir by a pumping system.

value_definitions.name: run-of-river
value_definitions.definition: The project typically or entirely generates electricty from flowing water with little to no storage capacity.

value_definitions.name: conventional and pumped storage
value_definitions.definition: The project has both conventional storage and pumped storage capability.

value_definitions.name: conventional and run-of-river
value_definitions.definition: The project has both conventional storage and run-of-river capability.

fields.notes_from_readme: Units: approximate, exact.
